name: Hot Cougars In Your Area!
description:
While sitting in a bar during the aftermath of some post-celebration drinks, and haplessly scrolling through dating sites, you’re hit with a very particular ad. Something about “Hot Cougars” being in your area, and it just so happens that one of the hot cougars is mere feet away from you.

(You’re gonna have to make the first move, fellas. Don’t chicken out, she likes guys who aren’t afraid to approach…)
creator: CrabRangoonie
